title: astrantia maxima subsp. maxima
intro: Astrantia maxima subsp. maxima, also known as Great Masterwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of inflammation and digestive issues due to its antioxidant and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Astrantia maxima subsp. maxima include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps, making it a valuable remedy for women's health. Astrantia maxima subsp. maxima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, and its roots can also be dried and used in herbal supplements.
